loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing kVA, kW, and Current scores derived from nameplate ratings and live measurements; headroom is the minimum of these three scores.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing current load (kW) and PF; 30d load history sparkline is omitted because the interpreter lacks per-bucket rated-kW normalization for the sparkline objects.
